name: FLOWERS FOODS INC
summary: Flowers Foods, Inc. is the second-largest producer and marketer of packaged bakery foods in the United States. Founded in 1919 and headquartered in Thomasville, Georgia, the company produces breads, buns, rolls, snack items (bars, cakes, cookies, crackers), bagels, English muffins, tortillas, and baking mixes. Products are sold under brands including Nature's Own, Dave's Killer Bread, Canyon Bakehouse, Simple Mills, Wonder, and Tastykake across retail and foodservice channels.

products.name: Nature's Own
products.description: Packaged bread brand among the best known in the U.S. baking industry.

products.name: Dave's Killer Bread (DKB)
products.description: Branded packaged bread product with sales improvement noted in Fiscal 2025.

products.name: Canyon Bakehouse
products.description: Branded bakery product line sold under the Flowers Foods portfolio.

products.name: Simple Mills
products.description: Premium better-for-you crackers, cookies, snack bars, and baking mixes made with simple, nutrient-dense ingredients.

products.name: Wonder
products.description: Branded bakery product including cake products with sales improvement in Fiscal 2025.

products.name: Tastykake
products.description: Branded snack bakery product line within the Flowers Foods portfolio.
